settings.title: Flash Day to Kick Off the Year
settings.excerpt: One Saturday, a wall of ready to go designs, and a small price for a fresh start.
settings.body:
There is something about January that makes people want to mark a new chapter, so we are leaning into it.

On the last Saturday of the month we are holding a flash day. Each artist has drawn a sheet of small, ready to go pieces, first come first served, walk ins only.

How the day works

Flash means the designs are already drawn and ready, so there is no consultation and no waiting a week for a custom piece. You pick from the sheets on the wall, put your name down, and we work through the list as the day goes.

  • Walk ins only, no appointments taken in advance.
  • Set prices per design, marked on the sheets.
  • First come, first served, so the popular pieces go early.

It is a relaxed, busy day and a low pressure way to get tattooed if you have been circling the idea for a while. Doors open at ten, and the good designs go fast.

If it is your first tattoo

Flash day is a good place to start. The pieces are small, the choice is made for you, and the room is full of people doing the same thing, which takes the edge off the nerves.

Come early, eat something first, and bring a friend if it helps. Even if you only come to look at the sheets and watch, you are welcome, and there is no pressure to commit to anything on the day.
